layman_headline: Market fear is intense — no coin offers a clean entry right now, so we wait.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in 'Extreme Fear' mode with a score of 25 out of 100, and it's getting worse day by day. Bitcoin is holding relatively steady around $64K, but altcoins are bleeding — most are below their key moving averages, meaning the trend is still pointing down. While a few coins like BONK are getting cheap enough to tempt bargain hunters, the charts show pure selling pressure with no signs of a bottom yet. The smartest move right now is to stay on the sidelines with cash ready for when conditions improve.
layman_action: Do nothing this cycle. Keep your cash dry and watch for ETH to dip to the $1,800 support level with a confirming bounce — that would be a much cleaner entry. Patience pays in fearful markets.
expert_reasoning: Every swing candidate presents significant headwinds. BONK has a -2.0 chart bias with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu — catching that falling knife is reckless despite the RSI near 31. DEXE is overbought at RSI 71 after a +63% 5-day run. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but it's already up 22% in 7 days with a terrible risk/reward ratio of 0.38x — chasing that is textbook FOMO. ETH is the most compelling on watchlist basis: RSI at 39 (our highest-reliability signal at 80% win rate), $1,800 support nearby, and Blockworks reporting an ETH derivatives reset that could precede a move. However, the chart bias is -0.70 with price below all MAs, and BTC dominance at 56.4% signals continued alt weakness. In Extreme Fear with worsening trend, the disciplined play is to wait for $1,800 support to be tested and hold.
risk_factors: Extreme Fear index is worsening (25 and dropping) — could cascade into deeper selloff across all alts
BTC dominance at 56.4% and rising means capital is flowing away from altcoins toward Bitcoin
No MACD bullish cross or volume breakout confirmation on any candidate — entering without confirmation risks catching a falling knife
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a strong bounce with volume would trigger a BUY
Fear & Greed index — a reversal from 25 back above 30 would signal improving sentiment
BTC dominance — a drop below 55% would signal capital rotating back into altcoins
market_context: The crypto market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) with worsening sentiment. BTC is relatively stable at $63.9K but altcoins are under pressure, with BTC dominance at 56.4% signaling continued capital flight from alts to Bitcoin.
context_banner: Extreme Fear dominates the market — disciplined traders wait for confirmed reversal signals rather than catching falling knives.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25/100 and worsening from 27 yesterday — broad market conditions hostile to new long entries.
ETH RSI at 39 is approaching oversold territory — our most reliable signal (80% win rate) but needs to hit 30-35 for a high-conviction entry.
Reported 'ETH derivatives reset and the next retail trade' — suggests leveraged positions have been flushed, potentially setting up a cleaner move.
FTX distributing $900M to creditors in fifth payment round — potential buy-side liquidity entering market in coming weeks.
No volume breakout detected on any candidate — all moves lack conviction, making entries risky without confirmation.
